```text
Example: Closes #1
```

---

## 4. AI Usage Declaration

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

- [ ] `docs/AI_AUDIT_LOG.md`
- [ ] `docs/PROMPTS.md`
- [ ] `docs/CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] `docs/REFLECTION.md` if needed

```text
Write here...
```

## 6. Verification

- [ ] Wrote or ran test cases

```text
Write here...
```

## 8. Checklist Before Merge

- [ ] Code runs successfully
- [ ] No critical build errors
- [ ] Changelog updated
- [ ] AI Audit Log updated if AI was used
- [ ] Team member can explain this change
